payload.label: window
payload.long_description: White-painted arched-top window with horizontal slatted blinds covering the semicircular transom and rectangular lower sash; blinds are mostly closed with narrow gaps revealing a blurred outdoor view, glass shows streaks/dirt and the lower-right area is slightly occluded by an interior object — appears roughly 2–4 meters from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"window","short_description":"white arched window with blinds","long_description":"White-painted arched-top window with horizontal slatted blinds covering the semicircular transom and rectangular lower sash; blinds are mostly closed with narrow gaps revealing a blurred outdoor view, glass shows streaks/dirt and the lower-right area is slightly occluded by an interior object — appears roughly 2–4 meters from the camera.","attributes":["white painted frame","arched semicircular transom","horizontal slatted blinds","blinds mostly closed","blurred exterior view","streaked/dirty glass","lower-right occlusion (chair)"],"distance_from_camera_m":3.0}
